query:
SELECT bi.description, bi.contactName, bi.lineAmount, bi.contactExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.supplierName = 'ChannelHaus' OR bi.description LIKE '%0738813335%' OR bi.description LIKE '%0738%'
LIMIT 5;
command:
